creator: Dom.Mitchell@palmerharvey.co.uk
text:
On 23 February 1999, Kris Kennaway proclaimed:
> On Mon, 22 Feb 1999, Dom Mitchell wrote:
> 
> > >Description:
> > 
> > Here's the latest version of fetchmail.
> 
> Maybe then, but 4.7.8 is out now :-)

Bah, humbug.  I noticed after I went home, as well.  I enclose the patch
below for 4.7.8.

diff -urP /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/Makefile fetchmail/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/Makefile	Thu Dec 17 09:44:55 1998
+++ fetchmail/Makefile	Tue Feb 23 09:06:31 1999
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 # does not need Python, so there is no RUN_DEPENDS for Python in
 # this Makefile.
 
-DISTNAME=       fetchmail-4.7.0
+DISTNAME=       fetchmail-4.7.8
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ccil.org/pub/esr/fetchmail/
 
diff -urP /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/files/md5 fetchmail/files/md5
--- /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/files/md5	Thu Dec 17 09:44:55 1998
+++ fetchmail/files/md5	Tue Feb 23 09:22:28 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (fetchmail-4.7.0.tar.gz) = b77ec659459cb225dd98324ba74e410c
+MD5 (fetchmail-4.7.8.tar.gz) = 9ff1c2f639902bbfe03c2b9fd05f0305


-- 
Dom Mitchell -- Palmer & Harvey McLane -- Unix Systems Administrator

	Free your mind -- http://www.opensource.org/
